productDisplayName: Clarks Women Henderson Fun Leather Black Shoes
description: Style Note Handcrafted leather goodness for your feet - with love from clarks. This shoe is moulded to Fit your feet to perfection and designed to add an understated polish to your ensemble. Style this with a lacy pair of ankle socks to add a girly twist to your look. Product Details Blunt toed ballet shoe style upper with a buckle detail on the toe box, perforations on the sides and stitch detail at the collar Padded footbed Short block heel with a heel patch on a TPU outsole with grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner for added shine
